commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can update the scanner and focused subscriber tests without product judgment.; Needs attention: The patch touches hidden reasoning delivery and still has a concrete attribute-bearing streamed-tag leak path.; Review finding: [P1] Allow attributes in streamed reasoning tags — src/agents/embedded-agent-utils.ts:194 (sha=7d2f94a266ac83e7d695939802d72c0a3215d7a7)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds `<reasoning>` and `<antml:reasoning>` handling to assistant text sanitization, embedded stream/block-reply tag stripping, and focused regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +16, Tests +23. Total +39 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: `REASONING_TAG_RE` notices `<reasoning hidden="1">`, but `stripBlockTags()` then scans with `THINKING_TAG_SCAN_RE`, which still does not accept attributes. A chunk containing the opener and hidden text before the close tag can therefore be treated as visible block-reply text.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can update the scanner and focused subscriber tests without product judgment.
